policy_statement: Portugal will complete the National Adaptation Roadmap 2100 (RNA 2100) in 2023 to update climate projections/impacts knowledge, produce regional adaptation narratives and guidelines for spatial planning/programmes, and identify investment needs/costs and strategic adaptation projects/measures.
verbatim_text: Following a similar approach, the National Adaptation Roadmap 2100 (RNA 2100) is being drawn up and is expected to be completed in 2023. The RNA 2100 will update the knowledge of climate projections for Portugal and respective impacts in key sectors... RNA 2100 will result in regional adaptation narratives, with a view  to  stablish  climate  change  adaptation  guidelines  for  spatial  planning  and  programmes... The roadmap will also help to identify investment needs and costs, including costs of inaction. In this way, strategic adaptation projects and measures will be identified to further support the adaptation policies on the ground.

policy_statement: Portugal established the Portuguese Environmental Fund (2017) to support national environmental policies and objectives/commitments, including climate change, and identifies international cooperation on climate change as an action domain.

The Portuguese Environmental Fund was established in 2017. The purpose of this instrument is to  support  national  environmental  policies... contributing  to  the  achievement  of  national  and  international  objectives  and commitments, in particular those related to climate change...

One of  the  domains  that  is  clearly  identified  as  action  domain  of  this  Fund  is  international cooperation in the field of climate change, in accordance with the compliance of international commitments.

policy_statement: The Autonomous Region of the Azores approved the Regional Programme for Climate Change (PRAC) by Regional Legislative Decree Nº. 30/2019/A, encompassing mitigation and adaptation, including studies of vulnerabilities and definition of adaptation measures for relevant sectors.

policy_statement: APA, together with the ENAAC 2020 Coordination Group entities, will ensure implementation, follow-up and monitoring of the P-3AC, including integrating measures into sectoral policies and funding instruments, preparing annual monitoring reports, and proposing revisions to the programme.
verbatim_text:
In this framework, it is APA's responsibility, in conjunction with the entities that make up the ENAAC Coordination Group:

- a) To promote the integration of lines of action and measures for climate change adaptation provided for in the P-3AC in sectoral policies and planning.
- b) To contribute to establishing a favourable framework for the pursuit of the lines of action and measures foreseen in the P-3AC, promoting their integration in funding instruments...
- d) To prepare an annual monitoring report on the P-3AC...
- e) To prepare proposals to revise the P-3AC...
